description_long: This object is a delicate flowering plant with slender green stems emerging from a small, rounded brown base, likely representing a bulb. The stems arch outward in various directions, each supporting a single, nodding flower with vibrant magenta petals. The petals are elongated and slightly recurved, giving the flowers a graceful, drooping appearance. Several narrow, lanceolate green leaves extend upward and outward from the base, adding to the plant's airy and natural look. The flowers are spaced apart, allowing each bloom to be individually visible and distinct. The overall form is light and elegant, suitable for placement in urban parks, gardens, or decorative sidewalk planters.
description: A slender, bulb-based plant with arching green stems, magenta drooping flowers, and narrow lanceolate leaves. The blooms are spaced apart, creating an airy, elegant appearance.
description_view_0: Front view shows the full spread of arching stems and all magenta flowers, with leaves radiating from the bulb base.
description_view_1: This angled view highlights the right-side stems and flowers, with some blooms partially overlapping and leaves more visible on the left.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the arch of the stems and the backs of the flowers, with the bulb base and leaves clearly visible.
description_view_3: Left-side view emphasizes the leftmost flowers and stems, with the leaves and bulb base slightly more prominent.
attribute_petal_arrangement: The petals are arranged in a radial configuration, with each flower displaying symmetrically spaced, slightly recurved petals that do not overlap significantly. The arrangement is typical of many ornamental bulb flowers, with clear separation between each petal.
